sentences.text: So yeah, real quick, easy call.
I sent you the access link.
How do you pronounce your colleague's name?
So I just sent him his access email as well.
So he should be able to log in the same way that you did and then I just wanna make sure that you don't have any questions.
Top of mind for me right now.
So you have access to, you know the the single asset.
You have the research functionality so you can spin up the custom market surveys on the fly, and then you have full access to the explore report as well for any sort of like sub market market data.
On the left hand side of the the app to you'll see where there is.
It looks like kind of like 3 little cartoon people that's to manage users.
You could feel free to add as many users as you'd like for the trial.

You just click on that type in their email, and then they'll get an access link similar to how you did or if you want me to do it, just send me some additional emails from users, and I can get those added as well
I think everything looks good to me.
So typically, what we do for these these 30 day trials is, I always try to schedule just like a kind of like a 2 week check in.
Make sure there's nothing out of the ordinary going on.
Get some feedback, and then let you back loose for the last 2 weeks is does that work for you?
That's perfect man, and I'll let you know if I have any questions as I test it out alright.
If you'd be able to pull up in your calendar, and if we could just do like a check in maybe so like 2 weeks today.
So like week of like the 14th through the 18, th I don't know if there's a certain day or time that
One second, I think we're we might be close.
We're close for Passover Close that week.
So you send that I'll accept it, and we get the ball rolling.
